prompt: Ping me if our checkout error rate climbs above 5%.
note: full chain: an alert fires on a metric, a metric rolls up an event. List events, metrics AND alerts first to check none already exist, then create what's missing

prompt: Mute the signup-conversion alert for now.
note: referenced by name — list to resolve its id, then pause (update enabled:false)

prompt: Bump the checkout error-rate alert to fire at 10% instead.
note: referenced by name — list to resolve its id, then update the threshold (not a new rule)

prompt: What alerts do we have set up?
note: read-only listing must not touch any rule
